claim_boundary: mesh_green proves only the bounded abstract S0/S1-S5 partition, unique auxiliary ownership, current child receipt reattachment, and terminal interface closure. It does not prove product runtime, M0/C1-C12 integration, installed skill bytes, global installation, ResearchGuard execution, or live conformance.

child_models.risk_boundary: immutable app-local member inventory, exact manifests/runtime assets, and rejection of author-side control residuals
version/hash/schema/Matters/native-validation compatibility and ResearchGuard integration status before selection
one deterministic validated active view with rejected-candidate visibility, freshness invalidation, and no legacy fallback
no-install bundled use, immutable external installations, and staged transactional synchronization only for a Matters-managed projection
native validation, installed-currentness, activation publication, and restoration of the prior managed projection on post-activation failure

closure_model.rationale: S0 consumes every S1-S5 disposition without entering M0/C1-C12.

terminals.rationale: current, blocked, pending, or rollback dispositions terminate visibly

transitions.rationale: S1_skill_bundle_inventory consumes the prior auxiliary disposition
S2_skill_compatibility consumes the prior auxiliary disposition
S3_active_skill_resolution consumes the prior auxiliary disposition
S4_matters_managed_skill_sync consumes the prior auxiliary disposition
S5_skill_validation_rollback consumes the prior auxiliary disposition
S0 publishes only a current terminal auxiliary disposition

coverage_items.description: S0_matters_skill_runtime Input x State finite relation
unique auxiliary side-effect owner for publish_active_skill_identity
S1_skill_bundle_inventory Input x State finite relation
unique auxiliary side-effect owner for write_skill_inventory_receipt
S2_skill_compatibility Input x State finite relation
unique auxiliary side-effect owner for write_compatibility_receipt
S3_active_skill_resolution Input x State finite relation
unique auxiliary side-effect owner for write_active_view_receipt
S4_matters_managed_skill_sync Input x State finite relation
unique auxiliary side-effect owner for stage_managed_projection
unique auxiliary side-effect owner for activate_managed_projection
unique auxiliary side-effect owner for write_sync_receipt
S5_skill_validation_rollback Input x State finite relation
unique auxiliary side-effect owner for run_native_skill_validation
unique auxiliary side-effect owner for restore_prior_managed_projection
unique auxiliary side-effect owner for write_validation_receipt

target_split_derivation.rationale: S0 partitions inventory, compatibility, resolution, managed synchronization, and validation/rollback into five disjoint children.
